policy_name: Enterprise Access Control and Multi-Factor Authentication Policy
gap_description: Full MFA coverage for privileged and customer-facing accounts. PAM controls with session recording defined.

policy_name: Network Security Perimeter Defense and Segmentation Policy
gap_description: TLS 1.2+ enforcement and network zone segregation defined. Patch management SLA of 30 days specified.

policy_name: Endpoint Security and Device Management Policy
gap_description: Policy does not explicitly address ATM endpoint hardening requirements under RBI-CYB-15. Requires update to include ATM-specific controls.

policy_name: Vulnerability Management and Security Testing Policy
gap_description: Annual VAPT for payment apps defined. Biennial third-party pen testing scope specified. 30-day critical patch SLA covered.

policy_name: Security Operations and SIEM Policy
gap_description: 24x7 SOC defined with threat intelligence integration. SIEM with 180-day online and 1-year archival log retention. APT detection capability specified.

policy_name: Information Security Governance and Cyber Security Framework Policy
gap_description: Board-approved Cyber Security Policy distinct from IT Policy. Annual review cycle. PAM governance framework defined.

policy_name: Secure Mobile and Application Development Policy
gap_description: Prohibits local device storage of sensitive data. Mandates server-side processing for authentication. Mobile permission framework for lending apps explicitly defined.

policy_name: Application Security Testing and Software Supply Chain Policy
gap_description: SAST/DAST for all banking apps before release. SBOM tracking for open-source components. Third-party payment vendor VAPT requirement.

policy_name: IT Infrastructure Security and Baseline Configuration Policy
gap_description: TLS version enforcement across infrastructure. NTP synchronisation with NIC/NPL servers mandated. Baseline hardening standards defined.

policy_name: IT Asset and Inventory Management Policy
gap_description: Quarterly digital payment asset inventory review. IT outsourcing register maintenance covered. Cloud and on-premise asset tracking unified.

policy_name: Business Continuity and Disaster Recovery Policy
gap_description: Biannual DR drills defined. Maximum Tolerable Downtime of 2 hours for critical systems specified. Recovery Time Objectives aligned to RBI thresholds.

policy_name: Cyber Incident Response and Regulatory Reporting Policy
gap_description: 6-hour reporting to CERT-In. 2-6 hour reporting to RBI for cyber incidents. 24-hour detailed report submission. Payment fraud escalation matrix defined.

policy_name: Customer Due Diligence and KYC Onboarding Standard
gap_description: Full CDD including OVD-based verification. Beneficial owner identification for non-individual entities. Small account conversion to full KYC within 24 months. Anonymous account prohibition with freeze protocol.

policy_name: Anti-Money Laundering and CFT Policy
gap_description: Board-approved AML/CFT policy with annual review. EDD for high-risk customers. Transaction monitoring system integrated with STR workflow.

policy_name: Suspicious Transaction Reporting SOP
gap_description: STR filing within 7 working days of suspicion detection. No tipping-off controls. Principal Officer as single FIU-IND point of contact. Escalation matrix defined.

policy_name: Enhanced Due Diligence and PEP Screening Policy
gap_description: EDD for PEPs NRIs high-value customers and high-risk jurisdiction customers. Senior management approval for PEP onboarding. Ongoing periodic PEP review.

policy_name: Sanctions Screening and Embargoes Compliance Policy
gap_description: Real-time UNSC consolidated list and domestic designated list screening at onboarding and continuously. Immediate escalation and FIU-IND reporting for matches.

policy_name: Video KYC (V-CIP) Operational Procedure
gap_description: Live interaction with liveness detection geo-tagging and face match with OVD. Only trained and certified officials conduct V-CIP sessions.

policy_name: Re-KYC Periodic Updation and Small Account Management SOP
gap_description: Re-KYC frequency thresholds are defined but the automated trigger system for 2/8/10 year cycles is not yet implemented. Manual tracking is error-prone and creates compliance exposure.

policy_name: Data Localization and Payment Data Sovereignty Policy
gap_description: All payment data stored in India-based infrastructure. DLP deployment to prevent unauthorised exfiltration. Data repatriation from foreign processors within 1 business day.

policy_name: Customer Data Privacy and Protection Standard
gap_description: Consent framework defined for adults but verifiable parental consent mechanism for child data (DPDP-06) is not yet implemented. Child age-gating controls are absent.

policy_name: Data Retention Archival and Records Management Guidelines
gap_description: 5-year post-relationship KYC record retention. 5-year subscriber data retention for service providers. Archival standards and retrieval SLAs defined.

policy_name: Data Classification Labeling and Handling Standard
gap_description: Four-tier classification (Public Internal Confidential Restricted). Handling procedures per tier. Technical and organisational controls proportionate to sensitivity.

policy_name: Right to Erasure and Data Minimisation Protocol
gap_description: Erasure workflow is defined but the automated deletion script does not cover archived cold storage. Manual deletion from archive tier creates a compliance gap against DPDP Section 8(7).

policy_name: Consent Management and Withdrawal Framework
gap_description: Pre-consent notice in plain language defined. Withdrawal mechanism parity with consent giving. Processing cessation within 72 hours of withdrawal.

policy_name: Data Breach Detection Notification and Response Procedure
gap_description: Data Protection Board notification defined. Affected data principal individual notification workflow. Breach detection integrated with SIEM alerts.

policy_name: Sensitive Data Masking and PAN Protection Standard
gap_description: Full PAN masking in all logs displays and exports. Account number truncation to last 4 digits in UI. Automated SQL masking applied to production DB clones used in testing.

policy_name: Employee Cyber Security Awareness and Training Policy
gap_description: Annual cyber security training for all staff. Specialised training tracks for IT staff and sensitive data handlers. Training completion tracked and reported to Board.

policy_name: Payment Fraud Prevention Monitoring and Reporting Policy
gap_description: Real-time transaction anomaly detection system. Velocity checks for UPI NEFT RTGS IMPS. Customer SMS/email notification for transactions above ₹5000. RBI reporting for frauds above ₹1 crore within 14 days.

policy_name: Payment Systems Security and Interbank Controls Policy
gap_description: SWIFT Alliance Gateway controls. Interbank payment security baselines. Fraud escalation integration with POL-FRAUD-101.

policy_name: Digital Lending Application Security and Disbursement Controls
gap_description: Direct borrower-to-RE disbursal controls. No LSP pass-through accounts. Application security baseline for lending portal aligned to RBI-DPS-2021.

policy_name: Alternative Data and Borrower Data Usage Policy
gap_description: LSP data storage restrictions. Minimal transactional data only. Data sharing agreements mandatory in LSP contracts.

policy_name: Loan Service Provider Management and Disclosure Policy
gap_description: KFS template is defined but the APR computation engine has not been validated against RBI's all-inclusive cost definition. May result in incorrect APR disclosure. GAP under RBI-DLEND-02.

policy_name: IT Vendor Risk Assessment and Outsourcing Governance SOP
gap_description: Regulatory audit rights in all vendor contracts. IT outsourcing register maintained and annually reviewed. Board-approved outsourcing policy with exit strategy. 3-month exit notice and certified data destruction.

policy_name: Third-Party Cloud Services Governance Policy
gap_description: Cloud service provider contractual requirements. Data sovereignty provisions for Indian customer data. Subscriber data retention obligations for cloud providers.

policy_name: Vendor Security Audit Requirements Standard
gap_description: Security audit rights exercisable at the bank's discretion. Vendor penetration testing evidence accepted as audit input. Sub-contractor audit pass-through required.

policy_name: Cross-Border Vendor Data Transfer and Sovereignty Policy
gap_description: Indian regulator access rights in all overseas contracts. Data repatriation obligations. Cross-border transfer impact assessments before new overseas vendor engagement.

policy_name: Internal Audit Charter Independence and Reporting Policy
gap_description: Direct Audit Committee reporting. Unfettered access to all records and systems. Escalation protocol for access impediments.

policy_name: Risk-Based Internal Audit Methodology
gap_description: Risk assessment methodology covering all business units outsourced activities and IT/cyber audit. Annual audit plan with Board Audit Committee approval.
